{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130152A5D755DD446F4E21018B"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618197485795771161","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"历史学博士穿成纳兰容若，带着现代认知与原主诗词金手指，在康熙年间步步自救。本该走向早逝的人生，因他的介入悄然改写，挚友、战事、皇权格局皆生变数。故事最妙的是，身份反差与历史偏差很有看点，感情与权谋交织，张力十足。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773753250,"group_id":"7612284049146514457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"作者不知道要说一些什么😛","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx0+ki7ne/dJTGnLYF2AObSOgRA9vdnQ8BBIsXFtC6YE","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/60824062beac4e0f8a3de352c64559d9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622474&x-signature=XNu5nUBETg%2Fd11bHlZMdSSeKIp0%3D","user_id":"1519974934647107","user_name":"凌封符牛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1519974934647107","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612284049146514457","book_info":{"abstract":"历史学博士常景桢穿成了大清第一伤心人——纳兰容若。
睁眼就是康熙十五年，三藩战火正炽，朝堂暗流汹涌。而他，满洲第一才子，天子贴身侍卫，纳兰明珠长子，每一个身份都让他站在风口浪尖。
更致命的是：原主英年早逝的结局，只剩十年倒计时。
常景桢决定自救。
好在，他背得滚瓜烂熟的《纳兰词》，成了最大金手指。
御前应对，他借词明志；结交名士，他以词会友；周旋权贵，他凭词藏锋。一首首“未来”的传世之作，被他提前写出，成了安身立命的底牌。
本以为能靠“文抄公”苟到结局，可历史却开始偏离轨道：
本应早逝的挚友活了下来；
本应落败的战役提前告捷；
而那位高高在上的康熙帝，看他的眼神越来越深。
“容若，你这句‘人生若只如初见’，是在怨朕？”
当康熙将他逼到墙角，低声质问时，常景桢才惊觉——自己早已不是历史的旁观者。
他笔下的词，正在悄然改变这个王朝的气运。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/c310d50b7f846d79ae9e5b5fa31ae1fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"饕餮和尚","author_id":"","book_id":"7612284049146514457","book_name":"大清折月录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d070","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612284926360027673","read_count":"115","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"117293"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"25","tags":"历史古代,历史,清朝,穿越,同人,学霸,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c310d50b7f846d79ae9e5b5fa31ae1fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253312&x-signature=CZGyiSXQBo19XwBD6oyxgco4xB8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52361724751","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130152A5D755DD446F4E21018B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8911,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13227,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":28},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618184059947123481","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"古风权谋文里的宝藏！女主穿越逆袭，智商情商双在线，权谋博弈精彩，感情线甜而不腻。剧情紧凑有反转，人设立体不扁平，氛围感拉满。文笔在线、节奏舒适，无狗血虐心，越读越上头，喜欢古言权谋的千万别错过。","text_exts":[{"e":5,"s":2,"text":"权谋文","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%83%E8%B0%8B%E6%96%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740693124E21018B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227618184059947123481%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227612284049146514457%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%83%E8%B0%8B%E6%96%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773750488,"group_id":"7612284049146514457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+hYiRORb+eQmTInlo0mY983Jmh7a5tlzDQz9Tk+fUbb","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2394092936369610","user_name":"大大咧咧的龙虾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2394092936369610","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612284049146514457","book_info":{"abstract":"历史学博士常景桢穿成了大清第一伤心人——纳兰容若。
睁眼就是康熙十五年，三藩战火正炽，朝堂暗流汹涌。而他，满洲第一才子，天子贴身侍卫，纳兰明珠长子，每一个身份都让他站在风口浪尖。
更致命的是：原主英年早逝的结局，只剩十年倒计时。
常景桢决定自救。
好在，他背得滚瓜烂熟的《纳兰词》，成了最大金手指。
御前应对，他借词明志；结交名士，他以词会友；周旋权贵，他凭词藏锋。一首首“未来”的传世之作，被他提前写出，成了安身立命的底牌。
本以为能靠“文抄公”苟到结局，可历史却开始偏离轨道：
本应早逝的挚友活了下来；
本应落败的战役提前告捷；
而那位高高在上的康熙帝，看他的眼神越来越深。
“容若，你这句‘人生若只如初见’，是在怨朕？”
当康熙将他逼到墙角，低声质问时，常景桢才惊觉——自己早已不是历史的旁观者。
他笔下的词，正在悄然改变这个王朝的气运。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/c310d50b7f846d79ae9e5b5fa31ae1fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"饕餮和尚","author_id":"","book_id":"7612284049146514457","book_name":"大清折月录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d070","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612284926360027673","read_count":"115","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"117293"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"25","tags":"历史古代,历史,清朝,穿越,同人,学霸,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c310d50b7f846d79ae9e5b5fa31ae1fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253312&x-signature=CZGyiSXQBo19XwBD6oyxgco4xB8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52361724751","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130152A5D755DD446F4E21018B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_coun
